svg.text: ECO-SIM: Maned Wolf × Wolf Apple - Frugivory & Seasonal Range-Shift Clock
Obligate frugivory · Long-distance seed dispersal · Wet/dry seasonal range shift |

g.text: Each wolf disperses seeds up to 8.5 km/year.
toward veredas and moist valleys (RESEX area).
This seed shadow drives Cerrado succession.
